status: Fixed in current working tree; validating for commit
finding: The frozen `atm.mjs` runner stayed at its 2026-06-30 build while team-runtime source advanced through M8E/M9I/M10X; `team plan`/`team start` on the stale runner silently omitted new governance fields, so live CLI probes reported features "missing" while source validators passed. Nothing in the runner output indicated staleness.
expectedBehavior: The runner should self-report build-vs-source drift (advisory build timestamp or source HEAD delta) on startup or in `--version`/`doctor`, so operators know live CLI behavior may lag source before filing false feature-gap findings.
evidenceOrRepro: On 2026-07-13, `--version`, `doctor`, and runner-mode evidence gained `atm.runnerSourceDrift.v1` with frozen/source mtimes, advisory text, `syncRequired`, and the retained release sync command. `scripts/validate-cli.ts --mode surface` now asserts the `--version` drift evidence.
followUp: Commit the runner drift advisory repair with frozen release artifacts; keep `ATM_RUNNER_SYNC_REQUIRED` as the strict write gate.
